key.name: visibility-mode
key.description: 0 auto, 1 always visible, 2 only on hover.

key.name: show-app-label-when-menu-visible
key.summary: Show app label while top-level menus are visible

key.name: button-padding
key.summary: Horizontal padding for top-level menu buttons

key.name: hud-shortcut
key.summary: Shortcut used to open the Fildem HUD
key.description: Single accelerator in GNOME format, for example <Alt>space.
